title: Biome Intros
description: Shows a subtitle introducing you to the biome for the first time.
body:
(Not to be confused with the Custom Biome Intros plugin - this is a data and resource pack and is not related!)

This data pack is the data pack that gives you a warm welcome when you enter a biome for the first time in Minecraft.

With all of the 79 biomes across all 3 dimensions supported, you can hear a little whoosh and a message inviting you into the biomes or structures you come across.

![An example of the datapack working - a player walking into a plains biome and being greeted by a biome introduction.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4db7cb1bb05504bc5fabfef1e432fa091d975d_0.webp)

And don't think this pack is not compatible with other mods and data packs! As long as the mod or data pack adds a biome to this pack's tags, or includes a biome in a vanilla tag that this pack references, it'll fit right in.

<details>
<summary>Technical</summary>
Each biome and structure has its own advancement, tag and function to show the displays.
You can use the functions in commands and your own data packs if you want to make displays with your own triggers and other processes alongside them.
</details>

Thank you for downloading/installing!

[ ! ] **IMPORTANT** [ ! ]

As of version 1.2, Biome Intros requires the "Biome Intros (Lang)" resource pack to show translations of the biome names.

To give an example of a translation code, here's the plains biome code inside the ```en_au.json``` within the resource pack:
```
{
  "advancement.biome_intros.biome.plains": "Plains"
}
```
